reviewer.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator for independent accessibility-and-rights review

evidenceChecked: Exact detached candidate HEAD 54f10aa5d4e3d0d226426dd3a70b611ad0572dc1 and pack identity PREM-LPP-003 version 0.1.3
lesson.json ordered scenes, authors, aiAssistance, CC-BY-4.0 license, files, and empty thirdPartyAssets declaration
content/010-orientation.md through content/100-synthesis.md: headings, source order, tables and linear equivalents, modalities, recovery, boundaries, and source notes
assessment.json: untimed retake policy, response modes, answer logic, feedback, retry variation, rubrics, and remediation paths
references.json: all 10 source uses, licenses, rights bases and evidence, dated agentAccess declarations, terms locations, and access notes
claims.json and glossary.json: scene/source mappings, scope and uncertainty, stable terminology, and pending-review state
ATTRIBUTION.md, AUTHORING-BRIEF.md, and REVISION-HISTORY.md: course license, accountable authorship, material-agent disclosure, reuse assertions, privacy boundary, and author-side provenance

Generated browser reader for PREM-LPP-003 in headless Chromium: semantic landmarks/headings/tables/forms, skip link, visible focus, keyboard scene/frame navigation, focus return, assessment labels, live error/feedback status, and retry controls
Generated browser reader at 640px and 360px widths with reduced motion: no document-level horizontal overflow and keyboard-focusable bounded table overflow
Generated A4 print path inspected through PDF text extraction: all scenes, table equivalents, assessment prompts, answer conditions, feedback, citations, and attribution remained present
Automated npm run validate passed, including schema, graph, claims/source-note, rights-ledger, active-content, path, provenance, and deterministic build checks
Automated npm test passed: 30 protocol tests and 22 browser tests passed; 12 container-only CSP tests were skipped outside the container harness

Security scan of allowlisted pack source found no raw HTML, script/event payload, unsafe URL scheme, Markdown image, traversal, symlink, secret pattern, executable asset, remote embed, or personal/patient record
Crossref public REST documentation checked for public metadata access and abstract copyright boundary; NCBI E-utilities usage/copyright guidance checked for declared abstract routes

Frontiers record checked for source-wisniewski-et-al-2020 publication date, volume year, and CC BY notice; peDOCS record checked for source-tetzlaff-et-al-2025 abstract route and CC BY 4.0 document license
Digital Commons record for source-crissman-2006 and its displayed Elsevier website Terms and Conditions checked for the access boundary applicable on the declared 2026-07-20 agent-access date

findings.finding: The source record declares checked-no-agent-restriction-found, leaves termsUrl null, and attests that the authoring agent processed the public institutional-repository citation metadata and abstract on 2026-07-20. The cited Digital Commons record displays a Copyright link to Elsevier's website Terms and Conditions, last revised 2026-03-12, which apply to Elsevier services and prohibit using service content with artificial-intelligence tools absent separate permission. That restriction predates the declared access. AUTHORING-BRIEF.md and references.json independently attest that the authoring agent used the record's abstract-level content. Under RIGHTS-POLICY.md section 4, this is evidence that an agent processed a source that should have been classified human-only. The facts-only reuse basis addresses copying but does not cure the separate source-access failure.
findings.resolution: Before freezing a new candidate, remove or replace source-crissman-2006 and independently reauthor every affected claim mapping, source note, evidence-dossier statement, and lesson expression from sources whose agent processing is demonstrably permitted; alternatively, record explicit permission that covers the exact AI processing. Correct the source's agentAccess status and terms evidence. Do not merely relabel the record while retaining agent-derived material. Revalidate and obtain fresh exact-candidate reviews because these changes stale this review.

findings.finding: The reviewed teaching and assessment paths otherwise provide equivalent access: source order is semantic; both tables have linear prose or ordered-list equivalents; no operation depends on color, position, motion, sound, hover, drag, or time; response modalities preserve the reasoning standard; and the browser route supports visible keyboard focus, focus return, labelled form controls, live feedback, narrow reflow, bounded table scrolling, reduced motion, retries, remediation, and complete print output.

The candidate declares original course content under CC BY 4.0, no third-party assets, one accountable author and complete material-agent provenance. The inspected pack contains no media, personal or patient data, secrets, active content, unsafe TeX/SVG/diagram input, remote embed, executable notebook, physical-task dependency, or clinical/credential claim. Fictional cases and educational boundaries are explicit.

limitations: This review applies EmbeddedKnowledge policy and records rights evidence; it is not legal advice. Contract, copyright, privacy, and license consequences can vary by jurisdiction and may require qualified counsel.

Manual accessibility testing used headless Chromium keyboard, semantic DOM, narrow-width, reduced-motion, and print paths. No disabled learner testing or hardware screen-reader session was performed, so automated and manual checks are evidence rather than proof of universal accessibility.
No pack-local image, audio, video, diagram, chemistry structure, or third-party asset exists in this candidate; media-alternative and asset-level provenance checks were therefore not applicable.

Close-paraphrase comparison was limited to the allowlisted pack and public metadata, abstract, license, and terms routes needed for rights verification. Publisher full text, access-controlled material, and the Crissman dissertation file were not opened.

I did not inspect pack review artifacts, adjudication artifacts, pull-request review bodies, authoring conversations, or historical review commits. REVISION-HISTORY.md was inspected only as an explicitly allowlisted author-side provenance file.
